ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2002 Assigned To Arbitration On Jul-01-02
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, Court ordered defendant Eagle Manangement and defendant Ricon Center Associates dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. The balance of case is ordered to Arbitration pursuant to CCP Section
1141.11 (a), effective 7/1/2002. Proceedings reported by: Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193. (212)
